# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
ilk_restore_yam = {	#Restore the Yäm
	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = ILK always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	requires = diplomatic_range_age_1
	icon = diplomatic_training

	global_distance_from_capital_speed_propagation = 0.1
}

ilk_ilkhanate_resurgent = {
	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = ILK always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	requires = ilk_restore_yam
	icon = horde_ardor

	monthly_prestige = 0.15
}

ilk_persian_arts_and_architecture = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = ILK always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	requires = hire_artist_cost_modifier_advance_disc
	icon = ira_spread_of_persian_influence

	research_speed_modifier = 0.1
	global_urban_build_buildings_efficiency = 0.1
}

ilk_descendants_of_genghis_khan = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = ILK always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	requires = pike_and_shot_advance
	icon = successors_of_genghis_khan

	army_light_cavalry_power = 0.2
}

ilk_new_roots = {	#They move away from being horde-like to a more reformed state, more stable and robust
	age = age_4_reformation
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = ILK always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	allow = {
		NOT = { country_type = army }
	}
	requires = early_modern_administation
	icon = administrative_leadership

	government_reform_slots = 1

	allow_children = no
	
}
